name: Balsamic Chard
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch (~1-1.5 lb) of swiss chard (or greens of choice)
Freshly cracked black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chard and tear into pieces, discarding tough stems.
2. Sauté the tomatoes in a large skillet over medium heat until they reach your desired consistency (5-15 minutes). I prefer them on the soft side.
3. Add the balsamic vinegar, chopped chard, and water if needed to the skillet. Cover and steam vegetables until cooked to desired doneness (5-15 minutes), checking occasionally to ensure there is enough water in the pan.
4. Cooking time will vary depending on how tough the greens are and how well-cooked you prefer the vegetables.
